title: feuilleea calycina
intro: Feuilleea calycina, also known as Lophocereus schottii or Cereus schottii, is a species of cactus native to Mexico and Central America. The plant's stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Feuilleea calycina include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant is typically harvested for its stems, which are then used to prepare teas, tinctures, and ointments for medicinal purposes.
